challenge.title: Korak 18
challenge.description:
Pre petlje, kreirajte novu varijablu secret_codes koja ima početnu vrednost praznog spiska.

Zatim zamenite liniju return secret_code linijom koja dodaje secret_code u listu secret_codes.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poems):

    for poem in poems:
        secret_code = ''
        lines = poem.split('\n')
        for line_index, line in enumerate(lines):
            words = line.split()
            if len(words) > line_index:
                secret_code += str(len(words[line_index]))
            else:
                secret_code += '0'
        return secret_code

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and
until the end of the night"""

poem2 = 'The grass is green\nhere and there\nhoping for rain\nbefore it turns yellow'
poem3 = 'There\nonce\nwas\na\ndragon'

# print(pin_extractor(poem))

tests.text: You should have a secret_codes variable inside the pin_extractor function.
The variable secret_codes should have a value of an empty list.
At the end of the loop you should have secret_codes.append(secret_code).

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poems):
    secret_codes = []
    for poem in poems:
        secret_code = ''
        lines = poem.split('\n')
        for line_index, line in enumerate(lines):
            words = line.split()
            if len(words) > line_index:
                secret_code += str(len(words[line_index]))
            else:
                secret_code += '0'
        secret_codes.append(secret_code)
    return secret_codes

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and
until the end of the night"""

poem2 = 'The grass is green\nhere and there\nhoping for rain\nbefore it turns yellow'
poem3 = 'There\nonce\nwas\na\ndragon'

print(pin_extractor([poem, poem2, poem3]))
